46. Effects of the 6 from Karakāńś. If the 6 from Karakāńś is occupied by
a malefic, the native will be an agriculturist, while he will be indolent, if a
th rd
benefic is in the 6 from Karakāńś. The 3 from Karakāńś should also be
similarly considered.
th th
47-48. Effects of the 7 from Karakāńś. If Candr and Guru are in the 7
th
from Karakāńś, the native will beget a very beautiful wife. Śukr in the 7
th
form Karakāńś denotes a sensuous wife, while Budh in the 7 from
th
Karakāńś indicates a wife, versed in arts. Sūrya in the 7 from Karakāńś
th
will give a wife, who will be confining domestic core, while Śani in the 7
from Karakāńś denotes a wife of a higher age bracket, or a pious and/or
th
sick wife. Rahu in the 7 from Karakāńś will bring a widow in marriage.
